home.heroDescription: Browse the latest banzuke, daily torikumi results, and scheduled matches.

archives.pageDescription: Banzuke and torikumi results from previous tournaments.

banzuke.pageDescription: Makuuchi and Juryo banzuke and records for {{gregorianBasho}} / URL: {{bandukePath}}
banzuke.aboutDescription1: This page displays the makuuchi and juryo banzuke and records for {{bashoTitle}} ({{gregorianBasho}}).
banzuke.aboutDescription2: The East and West columns show each rikishi's shikona, yomi (reading), and rank.

hub.resultArchiveDescription: Follow results from day 1 through senshuraku. Unpublished days are shown as placeholders.
hub.scheduleArchiveDescription: View scheduled matches from day 1 through senshuraku. Unpublished days are marked as upcoming.

day.modeDescriptionSchedule: View scheduled matches from day 1 in order.
day.resultNotUpdated: {{division}} results have not been published yet.
day.scheduleNotUpdated: {{division}} schedule has not been published yet.
